name: honeypot
description: LLM honeypot with sequential attack detection using LSTM

scripts.setup:py: python3 -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.trigger:detect: node scripts/trigger_lstm.js --count 24 --mode attack && npm run detect && tail -n 10 logs/alerts.jsonl
scripts.pipeline: npm run preprocess && npm run train && npm run detect
scripts.report:refresh: npm run demo:large && npm run calibrate:runtime && npm run validate && bash scripts/task_runner.sh trigger --count 25 --mode adaptive && npm run detect && npm run gate:session
